---
title: Quickstart
---

# Quickstart

Questa guida mostra il percorso minimo per usare la libreria core. Gli adapter qui sotto sono dimostrativi: in produzione sostituiscili con adapter verso un provider reale o con il bridge LangChain.

## Installazione nel workspace

<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
```bash
pnpm install
pnpm --filter ontology-extractor build
```

## Uso base

<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
```typescript
import {
  OntologyExtractor,
  type EmbeddingAdapter,
  type LlmAdapter,
} from "ontology-extractor";

const llm: LlmAdapter = {
  async generateStructured<T>() {
    return {
      candidates: [
        {
          label: "Change Request",
          definition: "A documented request to modify a controlled process.",
          kind: "NodeType",
          examples: ["CR-001"],
        },
      ],
    } as T;
  },
};

const embeddings: EmbeddingAdapter = {
  dimensions: 2,
  async embed(texts) {
    return texts.map(() => [1, 0]);
  },
};

const extractor = new OntologyExtractor({
  llm,
  embeddings,
  output: { supportCountThreshold: 1 },
});

const job = extractor.extract([
  {
    id: "change-control.md",
    text: "A change request documents a proposed controlled process modification.",
  },
]);

const ontology = await job.completed();
console.log(ontology.types);
```

## Controllare il progresso

<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
```typescript
const job = extractor.extract(documents);

job.on("phase", (phase) => {
  console.log(`Phase: ${phase}`);
});

job.on("progress", (progress) => {
  console.log(progress.chunks.processed, progress.chunks.total);
});

const ontology = await job.completed();
```

## Raffinare con nuovi documenti

<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
```typescript
await extractor.extract(initialDocuments).completed();

const refined = await extractor.refine([
  ...initialDocuments,
  { id: "new-sop.md", text: "Additional controlled vocabulary." },
]).completed();
```

`refine` salta gli `id` gia presenti nello store e ricalcola l'ontologia da tutti i candidati salvati.

## Convertire nel modello importabile

<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
```typescript
import { toOntologyImportModel } from "ontology-extractor";

const importModel = toOntologyImportModel(ontology, {
  name: "quality-processes",
  namespace: "quality.processes",
  description: "Bozza estratta da procedure operative.",
});
```
